412: } 413: checkDomain(expr.consecutive.in, `${path}/consecutive/in`, issues); 414: checkBoolExpr(expr.consecutive.body, `${path}/consecutive/body`, issues, known, addBinding(bindings, expr.consecutive.var, expr.consecutive.in)); 415: return; 416: } 417: // Phase 1.1: gap, before, after 418: if ('gap' in expr) { 419: if (!Number.isInteger(expr.gap.min) || expr.gap.min < 1) { 420: issues.push({ 421: code: 'invalid_k', 422: message: `gap.min phải ≥ 1: ${expr.gap.min}`, 423: path: `${path}/gap/min`, 424: severity: 'hard', 425: }); 426: } 427: checkDomain(expr.gap.in, `${path}/gap/in`, issues); 428: checkBoolExpr(expr.gap.body, `${path}/gap/body`, issues, known, addBinding(bindings, expr.gap.var, expr.gap.in)); 429: return; 430: } 431: if ('before' in expr) { 432: checkDomain(expr.before.in, `${path}/before/in`, issues); 433: checkBoolExpr(expr.before.first, `${path}/before/first`, issues, known, addBinding(bindings, expr.before.var, expr.before.in)); 434: checkBoolExpr(expr.before.second, `${path}/before/second`, issues, known, addBinding(bindings, expr.before.var, expr.before.in)); 440: checkBoolExpr(expr.after.second, `${path}/after/second`, issues, known, addBinding(bindings, expr.after.var, expr.after.in)); 441: return; 442: } 443: // Atom 444: if ('teaches' in expr) { 445: const t = expr.teaches; 448: checkPeriod(t.period, t.day, `${path}/teaches/period`, issues, known, bindings); 449: return; 450: } 451: if ('teachesOnDay' in expr) { 452: checkEntity(expr.teachesOnDay.teacher, known.teachers, 'unknown_teacher', `${path}/teachesOnDay/teacher`, issues, [...known.teachers], bindings, 'teachers'); 453: checkDay(expr.teachesOnDay.day, `${path}/teachesOnDay/day`, issues, known, bindings); 454: return; 455: } 456: if ('classSubjectAt' in expr) { 457: const a = expr.classSubjectAt; 458: checkEntity(a.class, known.classes, 'unknown_class', `${path}/classSubjectAt/class`, issues, [...known.classes], bindings, 'classes'); 461: checkPeriod(a.period, a.day, `${path}/classSubjectAt/period`, issues, known, bindings); 462: return; 463: } 464: if ('classBusy' in expr) { 465: const a = expr.classBusy; 466: checkEntity(a.class, known.classes, 'unknown_class', `${path}/classBusy/class`, issues, [...known.classes], bindings, 'classes'); 31: onAiAnalyze?: (constraint: ConstraintItem, draft: ParsedConstraintDraft) => void; 32: highlightConstraintIds?: Set<string>; 33: }; 34: 35: export function ConstraintReviewPanel({ 36: constraints, 37: drafts, 38: confirmed, 39: newConstraintIds, 40: reparseLoading, 41: parseError, 42: canSolve, 43: solveBlockHint, 44: agentInput, 45: onConfirmDraft, 46: onIgnoreDraft, 47: onDeleteConstraint, 48: onSaveDraft, 49: onApplyTemplate, 50: onAiAnalyze, 51: highlightConstraintIds, 52: }: ConstraintReviewPanelProps) { 53: const [editConstraintId, setEditConstraintId] = useState<string | null>(null); 58: const confirmedByRaw = new Map(confirmed.map((c) => [c.rawConstraintId, c])); 59: const hardCount = constraints.filter((c) => c.type === 'required').length; 60: const confirmedHard = constraints.filter( 61: (c) => c.type === 'required' && confirmedByRaw.has(c.id) 62: ).length; 63: 64: return ( 65: <aside className={`${panelClass} flex flex-col p-4`}> 66: <div className="mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3"> 67: <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5"> 68: <span className={iconShellClass}> 69: <Check size={16} strokeWidth={1.5} /> 70: </span> 71: <div> 72: <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Kiểm tra ràng buộc</h2> 73: <p className="text-xs text-white/40"> 74: Bắt buộc đã xác nhận: {confirmedHard}/{hardCount} 75: </p> 76: </div> 77: </div> 78: </div> 79: 80: {parseError ? ( 81: <p className="mb-3 rounded border border-red-500/25 bg-red-500/[0.06] px-3 py-2 text-xs text-red-300">{parseError}</p> 82: ) : null} 83: 84: {!canSolve && solveBlockHint ? ( 85: <div className="mb-3 flex gap-2 rounded border border-amber-500/25 bg-amber-500/[0.06] px-3 py-2 text-xs text-amber-200/90"> 86: <AlertTriangle size={14} className="shrink-0 mt-0.5" /> 87: <span>{solveBlockHint}</span> 88: </div> 89: ) : null} 90: 91: {templateForId ? ( 92: <ConstraintTemplatePicker 93: onSelect={(templateId) => { 94: const c = constraints.find((x) => x.id === templateForId); 95: if (c) onApplyTemplate(c, templateId); 96: setTemplateForId(null); 97: }} 98: /> 99: ) : null} 100: 101: <div className="min-h-0 flex-1 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto"> 102: {constraints.length ? ( 103: constraints.map((constraint) => ( 104: <ConstraintDraftCard 105: key={constraint.id} 106: constraint={constraint} 107: draft={draftByRaw.get(constraint.id)} 108: confirmed={confirmedByRaw.get(constraint.id)} 109: isNew={newConstraintIds.has(constraint.id) && !confirmedByRaw.has(constraint.id)} 110: onConfirm={() => onConfirmDraft(constraint.id)} 111: onIgnore={() => onIgnoreDraft(constraint.id)} 112: onDelete={() => onDeleteConstraint(constraint.id)} 113: onAiAnalyze={ 114: onAiAnalyze && draftByRaw.get(constraint.id) 115: ? () => onAiAnalyze(constraint, draftByRaw.get(constraint.id)!) 116: : undefined 117: } 118: isReparsing={reparseLoading === constraint.id} 119: highlight={highlightConstraintIds?.has(constraint.id)} 120: /> 121: )) 122: ) : ( 123: <p className="text-sm text-white/30">Chưa có ràng buộc. ( 128: <ConstraintEditDialog 129: open={Boolean(editConstraintId)} 130: onOpenChange={(open) => !open && setEditConstraintId(null)} 131: constraint={constraints.find((c) => c.id === editConstraintId) ?? null} 132: draft={draftByRaw.get(editConstraintId) ?? null} 133: agentInput={agentInput} 134: onSave={(updated) => { 135: onSaveDraft(updated); 136: setEditConstraintId(null); 137: }} 138: /> 139: ) : null} 140: 141: {thenEditForId ? All search is lexical + precomputed embeddings. 11: * Embeddings are precomputed offline (scripts/offline/compute-embeddings.ts) and 12: * stored as static float arrays per kind. 13: * 14: * Design decisions: 15: * - Embedding is lightweight: 384-dim vectors, cosine similarity in-memory. 16: * - No vector DB; catalog is ~80 rows, fits in RAM. 17: * - Lexical fast-path uses regex triggers before embedding. 18: * - Retriever returns top-k candidates with schema + few-shot for the LLM prompt. 19: */ 20: 21: import type { BuiltInConstraintScope, ConstraintKind } from './constraint-registry'; 25: 26: // ─── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 27: 28: export type ConstraintRetrieverCandidate = { 29: kind: ConstraintKind; 30: scope: BuiltInConstraintScope; 31: /** Combined lexical/embedding score used by the ambiguity gate. */ 32: score?: number; 33: /** Precomputed embedding vector (384-dim). null = purely lexical kind. */ 34: embedding: number[] | null; 35: /** Regex patterns that trigger this kind (lexical fast-path). */ 36: triggers: RegExp[]; 37: /** Vietnamese synonyms / keywords for this kind. */ 38: synonyms: string[]; 39: /** Few-shot examples for the LLM prompt. */ 40: fewShots: ConstraintFewShot[]; 41: /** Negative few-shots: examples that look like this kind but map elsewhere. */ 42: negativeFewShots: ConstraintNegativeFewShot[]; 43: /** Required param names for validation. */ 44: requiredParams: string[]; 45: }; 46: 47: export type ConstraintFewShot = { 48: text: string; 49: /** Resolved params — LLM sees only the text + schema, not the answer. */ 50: params: Record<string, unknown>; 51: }; 52: 53: /** Negative few-shot: example that LOOKS similar but is a different kind. */ 54: export type ConstraintNegativeFewShot = { 55: /** A user-style sentence that looks similar to the positive few-shots. */ 56: text: string; 57: /** The kind that this sentence ACTUALLY maps to (so the LLM doesn't pick `kind`). */ 58: actuallyMapsTo: ConstraintKind; 59: /** Short Vietnamese reason for the disambiguation. */ 60: reason: string; 61: }; 62: 63: /** Hints extracted by Stage 1 (Resolver). */ 64: export type ConstraintResolverHints = { 65: /** Normalized user text. */ 66: normalizedText: string; 67: /** Entity resolved by Stage 1. */ 68: resolvedTeacher: string | null; 76: extractedPeriods: number[]; 77: extractedDays: string[]; 78: droppedIllustrations?: string[]; 79: illustrationSpans?: Array<{ start: number; end: number; text: string }>; 80: /** Scope inferred from entity match. */ 81: inferredScope: BuiltInConstraintScope | null; updated : d)); 117: } 118: return [...current, updated]; 119: }); 120: setConfirmedConstraints((current) => 121: current.filter((c) => c.rawConstraintId !== updated.rawConstraintId) 122: ); 123: }, []); 124: 125: function finalizeAiDisplayText( 126: agentInput: AgentInputPayload, 127: rawText: string, 128: modelText: string, 129: specs: ParsedConstraintDraft['proposedSpecs'] 130: ): string { 131: const canonical = preferCanonicalNormalizedText(agentInput, rawText, modelText); 132: if (specs.length === 1 && specs[0].kind !== 'custom_dsl') { 133: return specs.map((s) => humanizeConstraintSpec(s)).join('
'); 134: } 135: return canonical; 136: } 137: 138: /** 139: * AI-only re-parse after user rejects rule/built-in interpretation (no rule fallback). 140: * Phase 0.4: accepts an optional userFeedback (correction text) which takes 141: * priority over the raw input in the LLM prompt. 142: */ 143: const rejectAndReparse = useCallback( 144: async ( 145: rawConstraint: { id: string; text: string; type: 'required' | 'preferred'; weight?: number }, 146: currentDraft: ParsedConstraintDraft, 147: agentInput: AgentInputPayload, 148: provider: AIProviderConfig, 149: options?: { userFeedback?: string } 150: ): Promise<ParsedConstraintDraft | null> => { 151: const attempts = currentDraft.reparseCount ?? 0; 152: if (attempts >= MAX_REPARSE_ATTEMPTS) { 153: return null; 154: } 155: 156: setReparseLoadingId(rawConstraint.id); 157: try { 158: const previousAttempts: ReparseAttempt[] = [ 159: ...(currentDraft.previousAttempts ?? []), 160: { 161: summary: currentDraft.explanation || '', 162: displayText: currentDraft.displayText || currentDraft.original, 163: spec: currentDraft.proposedSpecs[0], 164: semantic: currentDraft.semanticRepresentation, 165: source: currentDraft.proposedSpecs[0] ? 'built_in' : 'semantic', 166: confidence: currentDraft.confidence, 167: assumptions: [], 168: createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), 169: }, 170: ]; 171: 172: const context = { 173: teachers: agentInput.assignments.map((a) => a.teacher.label), 174: classes: agentInput.assignments.map((a) => a.class.label), 175: subjects: agentInput.assignments.map((a) => a.subject.label), 176: days: agentInput.days, 177: periods: agentInput.sessions.flatMap((session) => 178: Array.from({ length: agentInput.periodCounts[session.id] ?? 0 }, (_, i) => ({ 179: session: session.id, 180: period: i + 1, 181: })) 182: ), 183: assignments: agentInput.assignments.map((a) => ({ 184: id: a.id, 185: teacher: a.teacher.label, 186: class: a.class.label, 187: subject: a.subject.label, 188: weeklyPeriods: a.weeklyPeriods, 189: })), 190: }; 191: 192: const result = await reparseRejectedConstraint( 193: { 194: rawConstraint: { 195: id: rawConstraint.id, 196: text: rawConstraint.text, 197: type: rawConstraint.type, 198: weight: rawConstraint.weight, 199: }, 200: rejectedDraft: { 201: summary: currentDraft.explanation || '', 202: displayText: currentDraft.displayText || currentDraft.original, 203: spec: currentDraft.proposedSpecs[0], 204: }, 205: previousAttempts: previousAttempts.map((a) => ({ 206: summary: a.summary, 207: displayText: a.displayText, 208: source: a.source, 209: confidence: a.confidence, 210: })), 211: ...(options?.userFeedback?.trim() ? { userFeedback: options.userFeedback.trim() } : {}), 212: context, 213: }, 214: provider, 215: agentInput 216: ); 217: 218: const specs = result.candidate.specs; 219: let updatedDraft: ParsedConstraintDraft; 220: 221: if (result.status === 'candidate' && specs?.length) { 222: const built = buildDraftFromSpecs( 223: currentDraft.id, 224: { 225: id: rawConstraint.id, 226: text: rawConstraint.text, 227: type: rawConstraint.type, 228: }, 229: specs, 230: agentInput, 231: { 232: source: 'ai_reparse', 233: confidence: result.candidate.confidence, 234: explanation: result.displayText, 235: } 236: ); 237: const displayText = finalizeAiDisplayText( 238: agentInput, 239: rawConstraint.text, 240: result.displayText, 241: built.proposedSpecs 242: ); 243: updatedDraft = { 244: ...built, 245: displayText, 246: reparseCount: attempts + 1, 247: previousAttempts, 248: semanticRepresentation: result.candidate.semantic, 249: source: 'ai_reparse', 250: }; 251: } else { 252: const reparseIssues = result.candidate.unresolvedQuestions.map((message) => ({ 253: code: 'low_confidence' as const, 254: message, 255: })); 256: const displayText = finalizeAiDisplayText( 257: agentInput, 258: rawConstraint.text, 259: result.displayText, 260: currentDraft.proposedSpecs 261: ); 262: updatedDraft = { 263: ...currentDraft, 264: displayText, 265: reparseCount: attempts + 1, 266: previousAttempts, 267: proposedSpecs: [], 268: semanticRepresentation: result.candidate.semantic, 269: confidence: result.candidate.confidence, 270: source: 'ai_reparse', 271: status: result.status === 'unsupported' ? 287: } catch (e) { 288: setParseError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Diễn giải lại thất bại'); 289: return null; 290: } finally { 291: setReparseLoadingId(null); 292: } 293: }, 294: [] 295: ); 296: 297: const applyTemplate = useCallback( 298: ( 299: constraint: ConstraintItem, 300: templateId: ConstraintFormTemplateId, 301: agentInput: AgentInputPayload, 302: existingDraft?: ParsedConstraintDraft 303: ) => { 304: const baseDraft: ParsedConstraintDraft = 305: existingDraft ?? 306: ({ 307: id: `draft_${constraint.id}`, 308: rawConstraintId: constraint.id, 309: original: constraint.text, 310: proposedSpecs: [], 311: status: 'unparsed', 312: confidence: 'low', 313: explanation: '', 314: issues: [], 315: source: 'template', 316: } as ParsedConstraintDraft); 317: const ctx = buildContextFromAgentInput(agentInput); 318: const values = defaultFormValues(templateId, constraint.type); 319: const updated = applyFormToDraft(agentInput, baseDraft, constraint.type, values, ctx); 320: setConstraintDrafts((current) => { 321: const has = current.some((d) => d.rawConstraintId === constraint.id); 322: if (has) { 323: return current.map((d) => (d.rawConstraintId === constraint.id ? updated : d)); 324: } 325: return [...current, updated]; 326: }); 327: setConfirmedConstraints((current) => 328: current.filter((c) => c.rawConstraintId !== constraint.id) 329: ); 330: }, 331: [] 332: ); 333: 334: const runParse = useCallback( 335: async (agentInput: AgentInputPayload, constraintList: ConstraintItem[], provider: AIProviderConfig) => { 336: if (!constraintList.length) { 337: setConstraintDrafts([]); 338: setParseError(null); 339: return; 340: } 341: setParseLoading(true); 342: setParseError(null); 343: try { 344: const raws = constraintItemsToRaw( 345: constraintList.map((c) => ({ 346: id: c.id, 347: type: c.type, 348: text: c.text, 349: weight: c.weight, 350: })) 351: ); 352: const confirmedIds = new Set(confirmedConstraints.map((c) => c.rawConstraintId)); 353: const drafts = await parseConstraintDraftsWithRaws( 354: agentInput, 355: raws.filter((raw) => !confirmedIds.has(raw.id)), 356: provider 357: ); 358: setConstraintDrafts((current) => { 359: const parsedIds = new Set(drafts.map((d) => d.rawConstraintId)); 360: const kept = current.filter((d) => !parsedIds.has(d.rawConstraintId)); 361: return [...kept, ...drafts]; 362: }); 363: const rawIds = new Set(raws.map((raw) => raw.id)); 364: setConfirmedConstraints((prev) => 365: prev.filter((c) => rawIds.has(c.rawConstraintId)) 366: ); 367: } catch (e) { 368: setParseError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Phân tích thất bại'); 369: } finally { 370: setParseLoading(false); 371: } 372: }, 373: [confirmedConstraints] 374: ); 375: 376: const preflight = useCallback( 377: (constraintList: ConstraintItem[]) => { 378: const raws = constraintItemsToRaw( 379: constraintList.map((c) => ({ 380: id: c.id, 381: type: c.type, 382: text: c.text, 383: weight: c.weight, 384: })) 385: ); 386: return assertSolvableConstraintState(raws, constraintDrafts, confirmedConstraints); 387: }, 388: [constraintDrafts, confirmedConstraints] 389: ); 390: 391: return { 392: constraintDrafts, 393: confirmedConstraints, 394: parseLoading, 395: reparseLoading: reparseLoadingId, 396: parseError, 397: hydrateFromWorkspace, 398: invalidateReview, 399: confirmDraft, 400: ignoreDraft, 401: updateDraft, 402: rejectAndReparse, 403: applyTemplate, 404: markConstraintsAdded, 405: removeConstraintReview, 406: newConstraintIds, 407: runParse, 408: preflight, 409: }; 410: } 1: # Constraint Engine 2: 3: ## Contract 4: 5: The constraint engine converts Vietnamese timetable constraints into deterministic `ConstraintSpec` and Constraint IR representations before solving. 6: 7: ## Fail-Closed Rules 8: 9: - Hard constraints must be solver-encodable, carry a valid IR expression, or be rejected before solve. 10: - Clear Vietnamese require/block/only phrasing must not be silently inverted. 11: - IR shape validation is not enough: semantic validation must also check entities, days, sessions, period ranges, and quantifier placeholder bindings against the current timetable input. 12: 13: ## IR Type Checking 14: 15: The TypeScript IR type checker validates a `ConstraintIR` against `AgentInputPayload`: 16: 17: - teacher/class/subject names must exist, unless the value is a placeholder bound by an enclosing quantifier to the matching entity domain; 18: - day values must exist, unless the value is a placeholder bound to the `days` domain; 19: - period values must be positive active periods for the concrete day, unless the period is a placeholder bound to the `periods` domain; 20: - `classBusy` and `classSubjectAt` atoms are checked with the same day/period rules as `teaches` atoms; 21: - `atLeast`, `atMost`, `exactly`, `exists`, `forall`, `count`, `consecutive`, `gap`, `before`, and `after` propagate quantifier bindings into nested expressions. 22: 23: ## IR-First Tier-1 Parser 24: 25: The IR-first Tier-1 parser is a deterministic shadow-mode parser for common Vietnamese constraint patterns: 26: 27: - clear require phrases such as `phải có tiết 4` produce positive `atLeast` IR; 28: - clear only phrases such as `chỉ dạy tiết 2 tiết 4` preserve the extracted allowed periods in the legacy comparison spec; 29: - underspecified disambiguation matches ask for clarification instead of guessing; 30: - unrelated text escalates to Tier-2 semantic parsing. 31: 32: ## Shadow-Mode Parse Pipeline 33: 34: The IR-first parser runs in shadow mode inside the parse pipeline: 35: 36: - legacy parse output remains authoritative and user-visible; 37: - IR-first output is compared with legacy output via the divergence classifier; 38: - divergence is logged to the default shadow logger and added to diagnostics; 39: - shadow logging must never flip parser authority before the Phase 4 rollout gate. 40: 41: ## Reparse IR Validation 42: 43: The AI reparse loop may return `custom_dsl.params.expr` as structured IR. That IR is not trusted by shape alone: 44: 45: - hard `custom_dsl` candidates without an IR expression stay unsupported; 46: - reparse IR must pass schema validation and semantic type checking before becoming confirmable; 47: - unknown entities, unknown days/sessions, out-of-range periods, and placeholder/domain mismatches fail closed as unsupported candidate issues. 48: 49: ## IR Humanizer V2 50: 51: The deterministic IR humanizer renders supported IR shapes to Vietnamese without calling an LLM: 52: 53: - `session` atoms render common session ids as Vietnamese labels (`morning` → `sáng`, `afternoon` → `chiều`); 54: - `before` and `after` expressions render both sides of the relation; 55: - `teaches`, `classBusy`, and `classSubjectAt` atoms are canonical supported shapes; 56: - unmatched output is reserved for genuinely unsupported shapes that need a new template. 1: /** 2: * Semantic reparse when user rejects an interpretation. 3: * Rule/regex is assumed failed — AI normalizes intent to built-in specs; no regex fallback. 4: */ 5: 6: import { z } from 'zod'; 7: 8: import type { AgentInputPayload, AIProviderConfig } from './types'; 9: import type { ConstraintSpec } from './constraint-spec'; 10: import { SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS } from './constraint-registry'; 11: import type { ReparseResult, SemanticCandidate } from './semantic-constraint'; 12: import { invokeChat, type ChatPayload } from './chat-client'; 13: import { parseModelJson } from './parse-model-json'; 14: import { validateReparseCandidateSpecs } from './reparse-candidate-validator'; 15: // M3.2: shared semantic-direction analyzer used for unified direction 16: // detection in the reparse prompt construction. 17: import { analyzeSemanticDirection } from './semantic-direction'; 18: 19: const reparseResponseSchema = z.object({ 20: status: z.enum(['candidate', 'unsupported', 'needs_retry']), 21: displayText: z.string(), 22: candidate: z.object({ 23: source: z.enum(['built_in', 'semantic']), 24: confidence: z.enum(['high', 'medium', 'low']), 25: specs: z 26: .array( 27: z.object({ 28: kind: z.string(), 29: params: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()), 30: }) 31: ) 32: .optional(), 33: semantic: z 34: .object({ 35: type: z.string(), 36: if: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()).optional(), 37: then: z.array(z.record(z.string(), z.unknown())).optional(), 38: constraints: z.array(z.record(z.string(), z.unknown())).optional(), 39: reason: z.string().optional(), 40: assumptions: z.array(z.string()).optional(), 41: }) 42: .optional(), 43: assumptions: z.array(z.string()), 44: unresolvedQuestions: z.array(z.string()), 45: }), 46: }); 47: 48: export type ReparseRejectedConstraintRequest = { 49: rawConstraint: { 50: id: string; 51: text: string; 52: type: 'required' | 'preferred'; 53: weight?: number; 54: }; 55: rejectedDraft: { 56: summary: string; 57: displayText: string; 58: spec?: ConstraintSpec; 59: }; 60: previousAttempts: Array<{ 61: summary: string; 62: displayText: string; 63: source: 'built_in' | 'semantic'; 64: confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'; 65: }>; 66: /** 67: * Phase 0.4: explicit user feedback when they reject a draft. When present, 68: * the prompt must treat this as the AUTHORITATIVE intent — the user is 69: * correcting the parser, and re-parsing must align with this correction. 70: * Typical use: the user types "không đúng, phải có ít nhất 1 tiết 4" after 71: * the parser suggested `teacher_allowed_periods` for "Thủy phải có tiết 4". 72: */ 73: userFeedback?: string; 74: context: { 75: teachers: string[]; 76: classes: string[]; 77: subjects: string[]; 78: days: Array<{ id: string; label: string }>; 79: periods: Array<{ day?: string; session?: string; period: number }>; 80: assignments: Array<{ 81: id: string; 82: teacher: string; 83: class: string; 84: subject: string; 85: weeklyPeriods: number; 86: }>; 87: }; 88: }; 89: 90: const BUILTIN_KIND_HINTS = [ 91: 'teacher_block_day — params: teacher, day', 92: 'teacher_block_period — params: teacher, period (one spec per period)', 93: 'teacher_block_slot — params: teacher, day, period', 94: 'teacher_preferred_periods — params: teacher, periods[] (soft)', 95: 'teacher_max_per_day — params: teacher, maxPerDay', 96: 'teacher_allowed_days — params: teacher, days[]', 97: 'if_then — params: if, then[]', 98: ].join('
'); 99: 100: function buildReparsePrompt(request: ReparseRejectedConstraintRequest): string { 101: const { rawConstraint, rejectedDraft, previousAttempts, context, userFeedback } = request; 102: 103: const teacherList = [...new Set(context.teachers)].join(', ') || '(chưa có giáo viên)'; 104: const classList = [...new Set(context.classes)].join(', ') || '(chưa có lớp)'; 105: const subjectList = [...new Set(context.subjects)].join(', ') || '(chưa có môn)'; 106: const dayList = 107: context.days.map((d) => `${d.label} (id: ${d.id})`).join(', ') || '(chưa có ngày)'; 108: 109: const prevAttemptsText = 110: previousAttempts.length > 0 111: ? previousAttempts 112: .map( 113: (a, i) => 114: ` ${i + 1}. "${a.displayText}" (${a.source}, confidence: ${a.confidence})` 115: ) 116: .join('
') 117: : ' (không có)'; 118: 119: const encodableList = [...SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS].slice(0, 40).join(', '); 120: 121: // Phase 0.4: user feedback, when present, takes priority over the raw text 122: // and over previous attempts. The user is explicitly correcting the parser. 123: const feedbackSection = userFeedback?.trim() 124: ? `## User correction (HIGHEST PRIORITY — user is correcting the parser) 125: "${userFeedback.trim()}" 126: 127: Treat the correction as authoritative: re-parse the RAW INPUT in light of the 128: user's intent as expressed here. Do NOT repeat any previous interpretation.` 129: : ''; 130: 131: return `You are a Vietnamese school timetable constraint normalizer. 132: 133: ## Critical context 134: The user clicked "AI phân tích" — rule/heuristic interpretation was WRONG or suspect. 135: Do NOT repeat the rejected interpretation. Do NOT use rule/regex fallback logic. 136: 137: ${feedbackSection} 138: 139: ## Two-step goal 140: 1. Try to map to built-in specs (if_then, teacher_block_day, subject_max_consecutive, ...). 141: For "phải có / cần có / ít nhất" sentences, the correct positive at-least kind is 142: one of: teacher_required_period, class_required_period, subject_required_period 143: (params: teacher|class|subject, period, minCount=1 by default). 144: 2. If built-in is impossible, return custom_dsl with params.expr (JSON IR) AND params.normalizedText: 145: canonical Vietnamese using "Giáo viên {name}" labels, e.g. 146: "Nếu Giáo viên A và Giáo viên B dạy Thứ 2 thì Giáo viên C không dạy Thứ 3." 147: 148: ## Rejected (do NOT repeat) 149: "${rejectedDraft.displayText}" 150: 151: ## Previous attempts (do NOT repeat) 152: ${prevAttemptsText} 153: 154: ## Raw user input 155: "${rawConstraint.text}" 156: 157: ## Valid entities (never invent) 158: - Teachers: ${teacherList} 159: - Classes: ${classList} 160: - Subjects: ${subjectList} 161: - Days: ${dayList} 162: - Type: ${rawConstraint.type}${rawConstraint.weight ? `, weight: ${rawConstraint.weight}` : ''} 163: 164: ## Built-in kinds (prefer) 165: ${BUILTIN_KIND_HINTS} 166: Encodable kinds include: ${encodableList}, ... 167: 168: ## Rules 169: 1. Prefer source "built_in" with non-empty specs[]. 170: 2. Use custom_dsl only when built-in cannot express the rule; then include params.expr (solver IR) and normalizedText. 171: 3. "tránh"/"né"/"đi muộn" + teacher + periods → teacher_block_period (required) or teacher_preferred_periods (preferred); one spec per period. 172: 4. "Cô X"/"Thầy Y" → teacher label from Teachers list. 173: 5. "phải có"/"cần có"/"ít nhất" + teacher/class/subject + period (without negation) → 174: *_required_period (NOT teacher_block_period and NOT teacher_allowed_periods). 175: 6. displayText: clear Vietnamese for user approval. 176: 177: ## JSON response 178: { "status": "candidate"|"unsupported"|"needs_retry", "displayText": "...", "candidate": { "source": "built_in", "confidence": "high"|"medium"|"low", "specs": [...], "assumptions": [], "unresolvedQuestions": [] } } 179: 180: ## Example 181: Raw: "Cô Thúy ... tránh tiết 1 với 2" 182: → specs: teacher_block_period Thúy period 1; teacher_block_period Thúy period 2`; 183: } 184: 185: export async function reparseRejectedConstraint( 186: request: ReparseRejectedConstraintRequest, 187: config: AIProviderConfig, 188: agentInput: AgentInputPayload 189: ): Promise<ReparseResult> { 190: const prompt = buildReparsePrompt(request); 191: 192: const payload: ChatPayload = { 193: baseURL: config.baseURL || 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', 194: apiKey: config.apiKey, 195: model: config.model || 'anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet', 196: messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }], 197: temperature: 0.2, 198: max_tokens: 2500, 199: response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, 200: }; 201: 202: try { 203: const response = await invokeChat(payload); 204: const content = response.content; 205: 206: if (!content?.trim()) { 207: return { 208: status: 'needs_retry', 209: displayText: request.rejectedDraft.displayText, 210: candidate: { 211: source: 'semantic', 212: confidence: 'low', 213: assumptions: [], 214: unresolvedQuestions: ['AI không trả về nội dung. Vui lòng thử lại.'], 215: }, 216: }; 217: } 218: 219: const parsedJson = parseModelJson(content); 220: const validated = reparseResponseSchema.parse(parsedJson); 221: 222: if (validated.status === 'unsupported') { 223: return { 224: status: 'unsupported', 225: displayText: validated.displayText, 226: candidate: { 227: source: validated.candidate.source, 228: confidence: validated.candidate.confidence, 229: semantic: validated.candidate.semantic as SemanticCandidate['semantic'], 230: assumptions: validated.candidate.assumptions, 231: unresolvedQuestions: validated.candidate.unresolvedQuestions, 232: }, 233: }; 234: } 235: 236: const specInputs = validated.candidate.specs; 237: if (validated.candidate.source === 'built_in' && specInputs?.length) { 238: const check = validateReparseCandidateSpecs(agentInput, request.rawConstraint, specInputs); 239: if (check.ok) { 240: return { 241: status: 'candidate', 242: displayText: validated.displayText, 243: candidate: { 244: source: 'built_in', 245: confidence: validated.candidate.confidence, 246: specs: check.specs, 247: assumptions: validated.candidate.assumptions, 248: unresolvedQuestions: validated.candidate.unresolvedQuestions, 249: }, 250: }; 251: } 252: 253: return { 254: status: check.status === 'unsupported' ? 'unsupported' : 'needs_retry', 255: displayText: validated.displayText, 256: candidate: { 257: source: 'built_in', 258: confidence: 'low', 259: assumptions: validated.candidate.assumptions, 260: unresolvedQuestions: [ 261: ...validated.candidate.unresolvedQuestions, 262: ...check.issues.map((i) => i.message), 263: ], 264: }, 265: }; 266: } 267: 268: if (request.rawConstraint.type === 'required') { 269: return { 270: status: 'needs_retry', 271: displayText: validated.displayText, 272: candidate: { 273: source: 'semantic', 274: confidence: 'low', 275: semantic: validated.candidate.semantic as SemanticCandidate['semantic'], 276: assumptions: validated.candidate.assumptions, 277: unresolvedQuestions: [ 278: 'Ràng buộc bắt buộc cần specs built-in — chưa chuẩn hóa được.', 279: ...validated.candidate.unresolvedQuestions, 280: ], 281: }, 282: }; 283: } 284: 285: return { 286: status: validated.status, 287: displayText: validated.displayText, 288: candidate: { 289: source: validated.candidate.source, 290: confidence: validated.candidate.confidence, 291: semantic: validated.candidate.semantic as SemanticCandidate['semantic'], 292: assumptions: validated.candidate.assumptions, 293: unresolvedQuestions: validated.candidate.unresolvedQuestions, 294: }, 295: }; 296: } catch (error) { 297: console.error('Reparse failed:', error); 298: return { 299: status: 'needs_retry', 300: displayText: request.rejectedDraft.displayText, 301: candidate: { 302: source: 'semantic', 303: confidence: 'low', 304: assumptions: [], 305: unresolvedQuestions: [ 306: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Lỗi khi diễn giải lại', 307: ], 308: }, 309: }; 310: } 311: } 1: /** 2: * deterministic-solver-eligibility.ts 3: * 4: * Quyết định một batch ConstraintSpec có thể chạy qua deterministic solver 5: * (CP-SAT + skeleton cố định) hay không. 6: * 7: * Default solve path chỉ chấp nhận batch `eligible`. Batch không eligible 8: * sẽ bị reject sớm ở `local-agent.ts` (fail-closed) — không còn nhánh 9: * AI codegen để fallback. 10: */ 11: 12: import { SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS, isSolverEncodableKind } from './constraint-registry'; 13: import type { ConstraintSpec } from './constraint-spec'; 14: import { isDeterministicallyCheckedKind } from './deterministic-validator'; 15: 16: export type DeterministicEligibility = 17: | { ok: true } 18: | { 19: ok: false; 20: reason: string; 21: hardCustomSpecs: ConstraintSpec[]; 22: unsupportedHardSpecs: ConstraintSpec[]; 23: hardUncheckedSpecs: ConstraintSpec[]; 24: }; 25: 26: /** 27: * Trả về: 28: * - `{ ok: true }` nếu MỌI hard constraint đều: 29: * + không phải custom_dsl, hoặc 30: * + custom_dsl có IR expr/pythonPredicate để solver deterministic kiểm tra; VÀ 31: * + thuộc SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS; VÀ 32: * + có deterministic checker. 33: * - `{ ok: false, reason, ... }` nếu có bất kỳ hard constraint nào không 34: * đủ điều kiện trên. 35: * 36: * Soft constraint không bao giờ block eligibility — solver sẽ chạy và 37: * deterministic validator sẽ surface chúng như unchecked/warning. 38: */ 39: export function getDeterministicEligibility( 40: specs: readonly ConstraintSpec[] 41: ): DeterministicEligibility { 42: const hardSpecs = specs.filter((spec) => spec.severity === 'hard'); 43: 44: const hardCustomSpecs = hardSpecs.filter((spec) => { 45: if (spec.kind !== 'custom_dsl') return false; 46: const params = spec.params ?? {}; 47: return ( 48: !(params.expr && typeof params.expr === 'object') && 49: typeof params.pythonPredicate !== 'string' && 50: !spec.pythonPredicate 51: ); 52: }); 53: 54: const unsupportedHardSpecs = hardSpecs.filter( 55: (spec) => 56: spec.kind !== 'custom_dsl' && 57: !SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS.has(spec.kind) 58: ); 59: 60: const hardUncheckedSpecs = hardSpecs.filter( 61: (spec) => 62: spec.kind !== 'custom_dsl' && 63: SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS.has(spec.kind) && 64: !isDeterministicallyCheckedKind(spec.kind) 65: ); 66: 67: if ( 68: hardCustomSpecs.length === 0 && 69: unsupportedHardSpecs.length === 0 && 70: hardUncheckedSpecs.length === 0 71: ) { 72: return { ok: true }; 73: } 74: 75: const parts: string[] = []; 76: 77: if (hardCustomSpecs.length > 0) { 78: parts.push( 79: `${hardCustomSpecs.length} ràng buộc custom_dsl hard chưa được hỗ trợ vì chưa có IR expr/pythonPredicate để solver deterministic kiểm tra` 80: ); 81: } 82: 83: if (unsupportedHardSpecs.length > 0) { 84: parts.push( 85: `${unsupportedHardSpecs.length} ràng buộc hard chưa được mã hóa CP-SAT` 86: ); 87: } 88: 89: if (hardUncheckedSpecs.length > 0) { 90: parts.push( 91: `${hardUncheckedSpecs.length} ràng buộc hard chưa có deterministic checker` 92: ); 93: } 94: 95: return { 96: ok: false, 97: reason: `Không thể chạy solver deterministic: ${parts.join('; ')}.`, 98: hardCustomSpecs, 99: unsupportedHardSpecs, 100: hardUncheckedSpecs, 101: }; 102: } 103: 104: /** 105: * Tiện ích nhỏ: chỉ trả boolean. Dùng khi caller không cần chi tiết reason. 106: */ 107: export function isDeterministicallyEligible(specs: readonly ConstraintSpec[]): boolean { 108: return getDeterministicEligibility(specs).ok; 109: } 110: 111: // Re-export để caller có thể dùng helper isSolverEncodableKind mà không 112: // phải import trực tiếp từ constraint-registry (giữ ổn định interface). 113: export { isSolverEncodableKind }; 1: /** 2: * constraint-ir.ts — TypeScript types and validator for the Constraint IR. 3: * 4: * IR (Intermediate Representation) is the canonical representation of 5: * timetable constraints. 63: 64: const TeachesOnDayAtomSchema = z.object({ 65: teachesOnDay: z.object({ 66: teacher: z.string(), 67: day: z.string(), 68: }), 69: }); 70: 71: const ClassSubjectAtAtomSchema = z.object({ 72: classSubjectAt: z.object({ 73: class: z.string(), 74: subject: z.string(), 75: day: z.string(), 76: period: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]), 77: }), 78: }); 79: 80: const ClassBusyAtomSchema = z.object({ 81: classBusy: z.object({ 82: class: z.string(), 83: day: z.string(), 84: period: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]), 85: }), 86: }); 87: 88: const AssignedAtomSchema = z.object({ 89: assigned: z.object({ 90: assignment: z.string(), 91: day: z.string(), 92: period: z.union([z.string(), z.number()]), 93: }), 94: }); 95: 96: const ConstAtomSchema = z.object({ 97: const: z.boolean(), 98: }); 99: 100: const AtomSchema = z.union([ 101: TeachesAtomSchema, 102: TeachesOnDayAtomSchema, 103: ClassSubjectAtAtomSchema, 104: ClassBusyAtomSchema, 105: AssignedAtomSchema, 106: ConstAtomSchema, 107: ]); 134: 135: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 136: // BoolExpr schema 137: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 138: 139: const BoolExprSchema: z.ZodType<BoolExpr> = z.lazy(() => 140: z.union([ 141: AtomSchema, 142: z.object({ and: z.array(BoolExprSchema) }), 143: z.object({ or: z.array(BoolExprSchema) }), 144: z.object({ not: BoolExprSchema }), 145: z.object({ 146: implies: z.tuple([BoolExprSchema, BoolExprSchema]), 147: }), 148: z.object({ 149: iff: z.tuple([BoolExprSchema, BoolExprSchema]), 150: }), 151: z.object({ 152: exists: z.object({ 153: var: z.string(), 154: in: DomainSchema, 155: body: BoolExprSchema, 156: }), 157: }), 158: z.object({ 159: forall: z.object({ 160: var: z.string(), 161: in: DomainSchema, 162: body: BoolExprSchema, 163: }), 164: }), 165: z.object({ 166: atLeast: z.object({ 167: k: z.number().int(), 168: var: z.string(), 169: in: DomainSchema, 170: body: BoolExprSchema, 171: }), 172: }), 173: z.object({ 174: atMost: z.object({ 175: k: z.number().int(), 176: var: z.string(), 177: in: DomainSchema, 178: body: BoolExprSchema, 179: }), 180: }), 181: z.object({ 182: exactly: z.object({ 183: k: z.number().int(), 184: var: z.string(), 185: in: DomainSchema, 186: body: BoolExprSchema, 187: }), 188: }), 189: z.object({ 190: compare: z.object({ 191: op: z.enum(['<=', '<', '==', '!=', '>=', '>']), 192: lhs: IntExprSchema, 193: rhs: IntExprSchema, 194: }), 195: }), 196: z.object({ 197: consecutive: z.object({ 198: var: z.string(), 199: in: DomainSchema, 200: length: z.number().int().min(2), 201: body: BoolExprSchema, 202: }), 203: }), 204: // Phase 1.1: ordering / gap operators. Maps to AgentInput.sessions. 234: z.object({ 235: session: z.object({ 236: teacher: z.string().optional(), 237: class: z.string().optional(), 238: subject: z.string().optional(), 239: session: z.string(), 240: }), 241: }), 242: ]) 243: ); 244: 245: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 246: // Constraint IR schema 247: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 248: 249: export const ConstraintIRSchema = z.object({ 250: id: z.string(), 251: severity: z.union([z.literal('hard'), z.literal('soft'), z.literal('info')]), 252: weight: z.number().optional(), 253: original: z.string(), 254: explain: z.string().optional(), 255: expr: BoolExprSchema, 256: }).passthrough(); // Allow additional fields (params, pythonPredicate, etc.) 257: 258: export type Domain = 259: | 'days' | 'periods' | 'classes' | 'teachers' | 'subjects' 260: | { list: (string | number)[] } 261: | { range: [string | number, string | number] } 262: | { in: Domain; where?: Record<string, unknown> }; 263: 264: export type Atom = 265: | { teaches: { teacher: string; day: string; period: string | number } } 266: | { teachesOnDay: { teacher: string; day: string } } 267: | { classSubjectAt: { class: string; subject: string; day: string; period: string | number } } 268: | { classBusy: { class: string; day: string; period: string | number } } 269: | { assigned: { assignment: string; day: string; period: string | number } } 270: | { const: boolean } 271: // Phase 1.1: session atom. presence/absence of (teacher|class|subject) in 272: // a session on a given day. subject?: string; session: string } }; 276: 277: export type IntExpr = 278: | number 279: | { count: { var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 280: | { sum: IntExpr[] } 281: | { scale: { factor: number; of: IntExpr } }; 282: 283: export type BoolExpr = Atom 284: | { and: BoolExpr[] } 285: | { or: BoolExpr[] } 286: | { not: BoolExpr } 287: | { implies: [BoolExpr, BoolExpr] } 288: | { iff: [BoolExpr, BoolExpr] } 289: | { exists: { var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 290: | { forall: { var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 291: | { atLeast: { k: number; var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 292: | { atMost: { k: number; var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 293: | { exactly: { k: number; var: string; in: Domain; body: BoolExpr } } 294: | { compare: { op: '<=' | '<' | '==' | '!=' | '>=' | '>'; lhs: IntExpr; rhs: IntExpr } } 295: | { consecutive: { var: string; in: Domain; length: number; body: BoolExpr } } 296: // Phase 1.1: gap, before, after. 297: | { gap: { var: string; in: Domain; min: number; body: BoolExpr } } 298: | { before: { var: string; in: Domain; first: BoolExpr; second: BoolExpr } } 299: | { after: { var: string; in: Domain; first: BoolExpr; second: BoolExpr } }; 300: 301: export type ConstraintIR = { 302: id: string; 303: severity: 'hard' | 'soft' | 'info'; 317: message: string; 318: node: unknown; 319: } 320: 321: export function validateIR(constraint: unknown): IRValidationError[] { 322: const result = ConstraintIRSchema.safeParse(constraint); 323: if (result.success) return []; 324: 325: return result.error.issues.map((issue) => ({ 326: path: issue.path.join('/'), 327: message: issue.message, 328: node: issue.code, 329: })); 330: } 331: 332: export function isValidIR(constraint: unknown): boolean { 333: return validateIR(constraint).length === 0; 334: } 335: 336: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 337: // Hard constraint hardening (Phase 0) 338: // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 339: 340: // M1.1: Use SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS from registry instead of maintaining duplicate list 341: // This prevents drift when new kinds are added to the registry 342: 343: export interface HardConstraintCheck { 344: id: string; 345: ok: boolean; 346: error?: string; 347: mechanism: 'ir_expr' | 'python_predicate' | 'known_kind' | 'unknown'; 348: } 349: 350: export function checkHardConstraintMechanism( 351: spec: { id: string; kind: string; severity: string; expr?: unknown; pythonPredicate?: string; params?: Record<string, unknown> } 352: ): HardConstraintCheck { 353: if (spec.severity !== 'hard') { 354: return { id: spec.id, ok: true, mechanism: 'ir_expr' }; 355: } 356: 357: // Has IR expr (top-level or under params) 358: const exprFromParams = (spec.params as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.expr; 359: if ((spec.expr && typeof spec.expr === 'object') || (exprFromParams && typeof exprFromParams === 'object')) { 360: return { id: spec.id, ok: true, mechanism: 'ir_expr' }; 361: } 362: 363: // Has pythonPredicate 364: const pythonPred = 365: spec.pythonPredicate || 366: (spec.params as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.pythonPredicate; 367: if (pythonPred) { 368: return { id: spec.id, ok: true, mechanism: 'python_predicate' }; 369: } 370: 371: // Is a known encodable kind 372: if (SOLVER_ENCODABLE_KINDS.has(spec.kind as any)) { 373: return { id: spec.id, ok: true, mechanism: 'known_kind' }; 374: } 375: 376: return { 377: id: spec.id, 378: ok: false, 379: error: `Hard constraint '${spec.id}' (kind=${spec.kind}) has no expr, no pythonPredicate, and is not a known encodable kind. It will be verify-only (not enforced in solver). Add an 'expr' IR field.`, 380: mechanism: 'unknown', 381: }; 382: } 383: 384: /** 385: * Phase 0 hardening: reject hard custom_dsl without enforcement. 386: * Call this at the Translator/TS level before sending to solver. 387: */ 388: export function validateHardConstraints( 389: specs: Array<{ 390: id: string; 391: kind: string; 392: severity: string; 393: expr?: unknown; 394: pythonPredicate?: string; 395: params?: Record<string, unknown>; 396: }> 397: ): HardConstraintCheck[] { 398: return specs.map((spec) => checkHardConstraintMechanism(spec)); 399: } 1: import type { 2: ConfirmedConstraint, 3: ParsedConstraintDraft, 4: PreflightResult, 5: RawConstraintInput, 6: } from './constraint-review-types'; 7: import { capabilityBlockReason } from './constraint-capabilities'; 8: 9: const UNRESOLVED_DRAFT: ParsedConstraintDraft['status'][] = [ 10: 'unparsed', 11: 'unsupported', 12: 'ambiguous', 13: 'needs_review', 14: ]; 15: 16: const NEEDS_CLARIFICATION = new Set<ParsedConstraintDraft['status']>([ 17: 'unparsed', 18: 'unsupported', 19: 'ambiguous', 20: 'needs_review', 21: ]); 22: 23: function isConstraintConfirmed( 24: rawId: string, 25: drafts: ParsedConstraintDraft[], 26: confirmed: ConfirmedConstraint[] 27: ): boolean { 28: const draft = drafts.find((d) => d.rawConstraintId === rawId); 29: if (draft?.status === 'ignored') return true; 30: if (confirmed.some((c) => c.rawConstraintId === rawId)) return true; 31: if (!draft) return false; 32: return !NEEDS_CLARIFICATION.has(draft.status); 33: } 34: 35: function isExecutableCustomDsl(spec: { kind: string; params: Record<string, unknown>; pythonPredicate?: string }): boolean { 36: // M9.1: custom_dsl MUST have a structured IR `expr` to reach the 37: // solver. `pythonPredicate` is no longer accepted from user input — 38: // dynamic Python generation is unsafe at solve-time. pythonPredicate 39: // is preserved for internal/migration fixtures only. 40: return spec.kind !== 'custom_dsl' || Boolean(spec.params.expr); 41: } 42: 43: function fixHintForReason(reason: PreflightResult['blockReasons'][number]): string { 44: switch (reason) { 45: case 'hard_raw_unconfirmed': 46: case 'constraint_unconfirmed': 47: return 'Hướng xử lý: Bấm «Gợi ý» để chọn mẫu có sẵn, hoặc «AI phân tích» rồi «Đồng ý» / «Đúng rồi» trên từng dòng bên phải.'; 48: case 'hard_draft_unresolved': 49: case 'constraint_needs_clarification': 50: case 'constraint_unparsed': 51: return 'Hướng xử lý: Sửa lại câu cho rõ giáo viên/lớp/môn/ngày/tiết, hoặc chọn lại mẫu, hoặc bấm «AI phân tích» để AI giải thích lại.'; 52: case 'hard_custom_unexecutable': 53: return 'Hướng xử lý: Ràng buộc dạng custom chưa có luật máy hiểu. Hãy sửa câu thành dạng mẫu có sẵn, hoặc bỏ qua ràng buộc này.'; 54: case 'hard_spec_unchecked': 55: return 'Hướng xử lý: Loại ràng buộc này hiện chưa được solver hỗ trợ. 60: } 61: } 62: 63: export function assertSolvableConstraintState( 64: rawConstraints: RawConstraintInput[], 65: drafts: ParsedConstraintDraft[], 66: confirmed: ConfirmedConstraint[] 67: ): PreflightResult { 68: const messages: string[] = []; 69: const warnings: string[] = []; 70: const blockReasons: PreflightResult['blockReasons'] = []; 71: 72: if (rawConstraints.length === 0) { 73: return { ok: true, canSolve: true, blockReasons: [], messages, warnings }; 74: } 75: 76: // Mỗi raw constraint chỉ được block 1 lần, dùng set để tránh duplicate 77: const blockedRawIds = new Set<string>(); 78: const perRawReasons = new Map<string, PreflightResult['blockReasons'][number]>(); 79: 80: const recordBlock = ( 81: rawId: string, 82: reason: PreflightResult['blockReasons'][number] 83: ) => { 84: blockedRawIds.add(rawId); 85: // Ghi nhận lý do đầu tiên gặp (ưu tiên lý do cụ thể hơn) 86: if (!perRawReasons.has(rawId)) { 87: perRawReasons.set(rawId, reason); 88: blockReasons.push(reason); 89: } 90: }; 91: 92: // Đếm theo rawId thay vì push message nhiều lần 93: const unconfirmedIds: string[] = []; 94: for (const raw of rawConstraints) { 95: if (!isConstraintConfirmed(raw.id, drafts, confirmed)) { 96: unconfirmedIds.push(raw.id); 97: } 98: } 99: 100: if (unconfirmedIds.length > 0) { 101: for (const id of unconfirmedIds) { 102: const raw = rawConstraints.find((r) => r.id === id); 103: // Xác định lý do cụ thể hơn 104: const draft = drafts.find((d) => d.rawConstraintId === id); Hãy bấm «Đúng rồi» hoặc sửa lại trên từng dòng bên phải.` 160: ); 161: } 162: 163: // Hướng xử lý: gom theo reason, không lặp lại 164: const uniqueBlocks = [...new Set(blockReasons)]; 165: const seenHints = new Set<string>(); 166: for (const reason of uniqueBlocks) { 167: const hint = fixHintForReason(reason); 168: if (!seenHints.has(hint)) { 169: seenHints.add(hint); 170: messages.push(hint); 171: } 172: } 173: 174: const ok = uniqueBlocks.length === 0; 175: return { 176: ok, 177: canSolve: ok, 178: blockReasons: uniqueBlocks, 179: messages, 180: warnings, 181: }; 182: } 183: 184: export function flattenConfirmedSpecs(confirmed: ConfirmedConstraint[]) { 185: return confirmed.flatMap((c) => c.specs); 186: } 1: /** 2: * End-to-End Parse Pipeline (Section 15) 3: * 4: * Wires Stages 1–5 of the Retrieve-then-Fill pipeline: 5: * 1. 436: const topKSection = buildTopKPromptSection(topKCandidates, hints.inferredScope); 437: 438: return `Bạn map MỘT câu ràng buộc tiếng Việt vào MỘT trong các kind được cung cấp. 439: Chỉ chọn từ danh sách kind dưới đây. Nếu không kind nào khớp → trả "custom" kèm IR. 440: KHÔNG bịa giáo viên/lớp/môn ngoài entity đã resolve. 441: Dùng các "extracted hints" cho param; chỉ map, không tự suy số. 442: Output JSON: { kind | "custom", params, confidence, missingParams[] } 443: 444: ## Top-k kind candidates (theo scope "${hints.inferredScope ?? '(chưa có)'} 452: - Tiết extracted: ${hints.extractedDays.join(', ') || '(chưa có)'} 453: 454: ${contextBlock} 455: 456: ## Output JSON Schema 457: { 458: "status": "mapped_builtin" | "semantic_only" | "needs_clarification" | "unsupported", 459: "normalizedText": "Câu tiếng Việt chuẩn hóa cho GUI", 460: "specs": [{ "kind": "built_in_kind", "params": { ... } }], 461: "semantic": { "type": "if_then|all_of|unsupported_precise_text", ... }, 462: "confidence": "high" | "medium" | "low", 463: "clarificationQuestions": ["Câu hỏi 1?"], 464: "assumptions": [], 465: "unresolvedQuestions": [] 466: }`; 467: } 468: 469: // ─── Analyze Constraint ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 470: 471: export async function analyzeConstraint( 472: rawText: string, 473: constraintType: 'required' | 'preferred', 474: weight: number | undefined, 475: agentInput: AgentInputPayload, 476: config: AIProviderConfig, 477: options?: { 478: previousAttempts?: Array<{ 479: displayText: string; 480: source: 'built_in' | 'semantic'; 481: confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'; 482: }>; 483: conversationMessages?: Array<{ role: 'user' | 'assistant'; content: string }>; 484: } 485: ): Promise<AnalyzeConstraintResult> { 486: // Stage 1: Build resolver hints (CODE — no LLM) 487: const hints = buildResolverHints(rawText, agentInput); 488: // Stage 2: Retrieve top-k candidates (CODE) 489: const topKCandidates = retrieveTopK(hints, hints.inferredScope, 5); 490: // Stage 3: LLM slot-fill with small prompt 491: const systemPrompt = buildSmallSystemPrompt(agentInput, hints, topKCandidates); 492: 493: let userMessage = `## Ràng buộc cần phân tích 494: - Nội dung: "${rawText}" 495: - Loại: ${constraintType === 'required' ?
